title: celosia cristata var. castrensis
intro: Celosia cristata var. castrensis, also known as the 'Castor Holly', is a variety of the Celosia cristata plant, a type of flowering plant in the Amaranthaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the Celosia cristata var. castrensis are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
